en: Begin with titles and dates, then compare materials and holding institutions.
Which details recur, and which details change?
zh-Hans: 先从标题和年代开始，再比较材料与收藏机构。
哪些细节反复出现，哪些地方发生了变化？

public_intro.en: Abdullah Frères (1858–1899) was an artist associated in these museum entries with west central asia and practices such as photography, printmaking, decorative arts. The selection brings together 3 works. Begin with titles, dates, materials, and holding institutions, then compare what recurs and what changes across the works; these pages do not include local images.
public_intro.zh-Hans: Abdullah Frères（1858—1899）是一位与west central asia相关的艺术家，作品中可见photography, printmaking, decorative arts等实践。这里选取3件作品；请从标题、年代和材料开始，寻找反复出现与发生变化的细节，页面暂不展示本地图像。
